selected_candidates.summary: Repair repoctl in place with evaluation-time re-extraction, command-bound hard-edge evidence, modern evidence-class gates, retained overrides, and a non-mutating check command.
Add an external wrapper around repoctl without changing existing finish/evaluate semantics.
selected_candidates.rejection: Would leave the canonical engine vulnerable and create a parallel authority path.

selected_candidates.summary: Only add tests and document the known evaluator weakness.
selected_candidates.rejection: Does not repair the engine gates required by the task.

maximum_patch.expansion_rule: If the 22-file envelope is exceeded, re-admit with a recorded reason before evaluating.

implementation_steps: Bump the engine version to 1.1.0 and add shared dirty-worktree, repo-path, and command-evidence helpers.
Clamp plan admission to capsule/effect/discovered-later bounds and reject inflated file caps or path scope.
At evaluate, re-extract current facts and rebuild authority, dependency, hypergraph, and correspondence artifacts; record differential findings.
Execute hard-edge evidence argv and allow only successful computed command results or explicit accepted blockers to discharge touched hard edges.
Compute P2/P3/P4 honestly from executed evidence and accepted external acceptance records; treat planned and supplied outcomes as unresolved for modern ledgers.
Add post-hoc override validation and retention, plus non-mutating check strict/advisory modes.
Extend doctor/registry/docs/tests, including the negative suite and historical trace018 compatibility.
discovered_later_policy: Allowed only for files within the engine, its unit tests, or active authority docs, with a rationale and no evidence-class widening.

predictions.claim: The new negative suite rejects failing evidence, inflated scope, absent execution evidence, planned hard edges, authority and correspondence regressions, bad overrides, unearned P4, dirty evaluation, calibration errors, and incremental/full parity drift.
The existing isolated repoctl self-test still reaches P3 and finished verification.
repoctl doctor reports external.acceptance.v1 and no registry errors.
predictions.falsifier: node decision/engine/repoctl.mjs doctor fails or omits external.acceptance.v1.

predictions.claim: The modern verifier remains compatible with the finished trace018 ledger.
predictions.falsifier: node decision/engine/repoctl.mjs verify --transaction decision/trace018 --phase finished fails.

stop_conditions: Do not claim P4; record external acceptance as blocked unless an accepted external record exists.
Do not weaken historical trace verification to make trace018 pass.
Do not bypass dirty-worktree gates; use --allow-dirty only when the ledger records the dirty paths.
Stop and re-admit if implementation needs non-engine product source.
